ui.title: SNOMED CT Implementation Demonstrators
ui.intro1Before: Welcome to our collection of SNOMED CT Implementation Demonstrators! This curated selection of demos showcases the diverse ways SNOMED CT can be implemented across different use cases. Each demonstration is
ui.intro1After: , free to explore, and easy to replicate, providing a hands-on learning experience for developers, implementers, and healthcare professionals.
ui.intro2Before: These implementation demos have been created through the collaboration and expertise of the
ui.intro2Link: global SNOMED CT community of clinical experts
ui.intro2After: , reflecting best practices and innovative use cases. Whether you're just getting started with SNOMED CT or looking to deepen your understanding, you'll find valuable insights here. Explore, learn, and join us in advancing healthcare interoperability.

encountersUiDemo.name: Encounters UI Demo
encountersUiDemo.description: A simulation of clinical data entry for clinical encounters SNOMED FHIR Terminology services. The classic SNOMED UI Demo.

ehrLab.name: SNOMED EHR Lab
ehrLab.description: A complete EHR simulation with generated persistent patients, clinical, dental, and nursing records, AI-assisted entry, CDS, analytics, interoperability tools, and Smart Health Links powered by FHIR and SNOMED CT.

allergies.name: Allergies
allergies.description: A SNOMED / FHIR implementation demo of recording Allergy / Intolerance details, from Allergies Clinical Reference Group

loincSnomed.name: LOINC & SNOMED CT
loincSnomed.description: A LOINC Ontology implementation demo, covering laboratory orders, results and FHIR resources.

ncptRefset.name: NCPT Refset
ncptRefset.description: A clinical demonstration of the NCPT (Nutrition Care Process Terminology) reference set.

maturityFramework.name: Implementation Maturity Framework
maturityFramework.description: An online maturity assessment tool and a dashboard for compiling and analyzing collections of maturity results.

bindingsSandbox.name: Terminology Bindings Sandbox
bindingsSandbox.description: A sandbox for learning and testing terminology bindings

snomedMaps.name: SNOMED Maps Demonstrator
snomedMaps.description: A SNOMED / ICD-10 maps demonstration, including complex map rules execution

postcoordination.name: Post-coordination Demonstrator
postcoordination.description: A SNOMED post-coordination demonstration, with new prototype Postcoordination Terminology server SNOWSTORM X

ipsTerminology.name: IPS Terminology Demonstrator
ipsTerminology.description: A demonstration of the International Patient Summary (IPS) terminology, including the IPS SNOMED CT refset

questionnairesManager.name: SNOMED & FHIR Questionnaires Manager Application
questionnairesManager.description: An application to manage a FHIR Questionnaires repository, with SNOMED CT bindings

questionnairesUtilities.name: SNOMED & FHIR Questionnaires Utilities
questionnairesUtilities.description: Utilities for working with FHIR Questionnaires, including SNOMED CT bindings

contextTransformations.name: Context Representation Transformations
contextTransformations.description: A demonstration of the transformation of context representations from SNOMED to FHIR Resources

snomedLlms.name: SNOMED and LLMs (AI Demo)
snomedLlms.description: This demo uses OpenAI ChatGPT API to demonstrate the use of SNOMED CT with Language Model Models (LLMs). A developer key for the OpenAI API is required.

snoguess.name: Snoguess (A SNOMED game)
snoguess.description: A SNOMED term guessing game, learn about SNOMED content while having fun and competing to achieve the highest score

roadmapGenerator.name: SNOMED Implementation Roadmap Generator
roadmapGenerator.description: A tool designed to promote and support the creation of implementation roadmaps for the adoption of SNOMED CT in countries, regions or organizations.

evolvingTerminology.name: SNOMED CT as an Evolving Terminology
evolvingTerminology.description: A collection of educational material and changes reports to understand how SNOMED changes on each release and help plan implementations accordingly.

descriptiveAnalytics.name: Descriptive analytics demo
descriptiveAnalytics.description: A demo of descriptive analytics for SNOMED CT, including a treemap visualization with nested boxes for hierarchical data exploration.

integrationsHub.name: SNOMED Integrations Hub
integrationsHub.description: A demonstration of SNOMED CT integrations with live data. Navigate the integrations hub to explore the different integrations with other classifications, terminologies, and code systems.

valueSetUtility.name: ValueSet Utility
valueSetUtility.description: A utility for transforming SNOMED CT value sets from non-standard formats (Excel, CSV, Snap2SNOMED maps) into standards-compliant FHIR ValueSet resources and packages.

extensionsSearch.name: Extensions Search Utility
extensionsSearch.description: A utility for running ECL searches across the latest SNOMED CT extensions and comparing concept matches by edition.

snolytical.name: Analytics with Snolytical
snolytical.description: A health data analytics demonstrator leveraging the SNOMED CT hierarchy. The demo shows how clinicians can get hands-on and engage with their SNOMED coded data directly, by building and running their own basic data-science reports.

mdrsViewer.name: Module Dependency Reference Set Viewer
mdrsViewer.description: A graphical viewer for the Module Dependency Reference Set (MDRS) that displays dependencies between SNOMED CT modules, showing which module versions depend on which other module versions.

drugStrengthRounding.name: Drug Strength Rounding Rules
drugStrengthRounding.description: A demonstration of drug strength rounding rules for significant figures in pharmaceutical calculations

medicinalProductClasses.name: Medicinal Product Classes
medicinalProductClasses.description: A terminology bindings demonstrator for medicinal product, clinical drug, and packaged clinical drug classes using reusable coding spec tabs.

fhirInternationalizer.name: FHIR Resource Internationalizer
fhirInternationalizer.description: Upload a FHIR resource, replace extension codings with their closest International Edition ancestors, adapt concept displays to the language and terminology of your target edition, and find historical replacements for any inactive concepts.
